description_long: This is a modern bathroom vanity cabinet featuring a rectangular white ceramic sink mounted on top of a wooden cabinet with a natural oak finish. The cabinet has a minimalist design with clean lines and a flat front, including a single wide drawer and an open shelf below for storage. The faucet is a sleek, metallic single-lever design positioned on the right side of the sink. The rear view reveals the plumbing and internal structure, with visible pipes and mounting hardware. The wood grain texture is prominent on the sides and front, giving it a contemporary yet natural appearance. The overall construction suggests it is designed for wall-mounting in a bathroom or washroom setting.
description: A modern wall-mounted bathroom vanity with a white ceramic sink, natural wood cabinet, and open lower shelf. Features a sleek faucet and minimalist design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the wood grain texture and the depth of the cabinet with the white sink and faucet visible on top.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the full width of the cabinet, the white sink, the single drawer, and the open shelf below.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, highlighting the wood finish and the sink's profile.
description_view_3: Rear view exposing the internal plumbing, mounting hardware, and the unfinished back of the cabinet.
